title: More Blocks
description: Adds new blocks and items to your game. Fabric and Quilt only exclusive.
body:
![Minecraft More Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65d0e18d3e83b9c937ac17990b89ef821ab3b7fd.png)
=======================================================================================

This mod adds new blocks and items to Minecraft.

New blocks:

Metallic Ore:

This block is a natural block, and generated randomly in the stone layer. It can be smelted in a furnace to obtain metallic ingots to craft metallic blocks.

Metallic Blocks:

Those are blocks crafted using 4 metallic ingots. They are building blocks, and also have a slab, stairs, trapdoor and pillar variants for more detailed shape in your metallic build.

Red/Blue/Green/Yellow Metallic Blocks:

They have the same stats as regular metallic blocks but are colored. They have slab, stairs, trapdoor and pillar variants like regular ones. As well they are obtained by mixing any regular metallic block with a red/blue/lime/yellow dye to obtain a colored variant of them with the respective color of the dye. You can put them in a furnace and turn them into regular metallic blocks.

Toggable Lamp:

Those are blocks which are crafted with having a redstone lamp in the middle and the rest of slots are filled with redstone dust. They can be manually toggled between off and on.

Crates:

Those are simple blocks which have 2 variants: A decorative variant that does nothing, and a functional one that cannot be opened but can be interacted with hoppers and comparators. The decorative variant is crafted by putting in every slot any planks. And the functional variant has the same recipe as the decorative variant but with the planks in the middle replaced with a chest.

Gasblock:

Those are white large bricks, they are crafted with 3 bricks and 2 white dyes. As well they have a stairs and slab variant.

Missing Textures:

Those are blocks with missing textures. They are not craftable yet. They have also a slab and stairs variants.

New Items:

Pizza:

just a pizza :3 does nothing yet and is not craftable yet.

Shawarma:

idk why i added this but you cannot craft it yet.

Rust:

A (kind of) useless item only used to make rusted metallic blocks.

Metallic Ingot:

A item obtained from smelting metallic ore.

 

My mod is inspired by this mod.

There's an official site for this mod: Here

 

WARNING: Do not download the mod from sites like 9minecraft or 9lifehack. It can have malware in it, please download only from official sources like CurseForge and Modrinth.
